svg.title: Diplomat-ai ecosystem: Know, Decide, Prove
svg.desc: Three products spanning the AI agent governance lifecycle: diplomat-agent maps tool calls statically (Know), diplomat-gate enforces policy at runtime (Decide), diplomat.run provides hosted audit and compliance (Prove).

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: GOVERNANCE AND RUNTIME SAFETY FOR AI AGENTS

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Three products. One ecosystem. Open source first.
